title: Kuwait Air Force is latest military aircraft spotted at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Kuwait Air Force is latest military aircraft spotted at Prestwick Airport. A Boeing C-17A Globemaster III from the Middle East country departed South Ayrshire for Dover Air Force Base in the US on Monday, March 9.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Kuwait Air Force is latest military aircraft spotted at Prestwick Airport
